object_description: The sequence (-1)^n is bounded but does not converge.
lesson: A universal claim fails when one domain object violates it.

claim: Finite graphs with same degree sequence are isomorphic.
object_description: Non-isomorphic graphs can share degree sequence.
lesson: An invariant may be useful without being complete.

claim: If n squared is even then n is even follows by the same direction.
object_description: Attempting to prove converse without separate argument.

claim: Checking finitely many even n proves the universal claim.
lesson: Proof must cover arbitrary domain objects.
